entry.title: Aegisub Documentation Backup
entry.summary: What is this? This is a backup of docs.aegisub.org. I found a backup of the website while searching for Aegisub’s Documentation and for some reason the website doesn’t work. So I searched for backups and I found a Reddit post that has a Google Drive link. I downloaded it and checked it and it’s legit so I created a Github Pages page for it. Link The Link

entry.title: Kubo-san wa Boku (Mobu) wo Yurusanai Manga Art Colored using Style2Paints V4

link.title: Kubo-san wa Boku (Mobu) wo Yurusanai Manga Art Colored using Style2Paints V4

entry.summary: Manga Art Source Lineart Kubo-san wa Boku (Mobu) wo Yurusanai - Chapter 47 Reference Kubo-san wa Boku (Mobu) wo Yurusanai - Chapter 23 Preview Original Reference Final Style2Paints Colored Image Program Used Style2Paints V4.5 Style2Paints Github Link

entry.title: TenSura Light Novel Art Colorized using Style2Paints V4

link.title: TenSura Light Novel Art Colorized using Style2Paints V4

entry.summary: How I did it I used a tool called Style2Paints. It let’s you color line arts using AI. I used a lot of Human hints to fix a lot of the color problems that the initial painting has. I also used the colored cover of TenSura Vol. 5 as a Reference. The line art also comes from the Status Section of TenSura Vol. 5 and used the portrait from there and upscaled it with Waifu2x to get a higher resolu...

entry.title: McDonalds Logo as Wikipedia Logo
entry.summary: DESCRIPTION Original Idea: u/thetoastedsnowflake Style Creator: DrPleaseRespect or u/drpleaserespect Preview How to Install Install Stylus in your browser of choice Chrome Firefox Opera Install the UserCSS Theme by clicking the Install Badge in the Download Section Download

entry.title: Marshmary and Wonderful Wonder - OSU! Replays

link.title: Marshmary and Wonderful Wonder - OSU! Replays

entry.summary: WHAT IS THIS? This are some of my OSU! Replays that I chose to release. These Videos are hosted on Vimeo because Youtube keeps flagging it and blocking it in all countries. They were originally hosted as HTML5 Videos in GitHub. But they were slow. MIMI feat. Hatsune Miku - Marshmary [Insane] WONDERFUL WONDER (TV SIZE) [Insane]
